mapper.select: select * from my_mall.`order` where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into my_mall.`order`(order_no, user_id, total_price, pay_status, pay_type, order_status) values(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalPrice}, #{payStatus}, #{payType}, #{orderStatus})
mapper.update: update my_mall.`order` set order_status = #{status} where id = #{id}
